objects.label: Laptop
objects.note: Where the LLM Router commits get made. Usually around midnight, with bad lo-fi and the desk lamp turned all the way down.

objects.label: Notebook
objects.note: A new one every quarter. Most of the good ideas live here before they live in any repo. Half the pages are unreadable.

objects.label: Coffee
objects.note: Filter, black, no sugar. Always cold by the time I notice it.

objects.label: Candle
objects.note: For the things I'm not yet ready to write about. I light it when a paper is stuck.

objects.label: Wedding ring
objects.note: Married to the love of my life. The first co-author who never asks for revisions.

objects.label: Window · canal
objects.note: The Brouwersgracht, on a clear night when you can see the gables across the water. Most of the running routes start by following it east.

objects.label: Books
objects.note: A short stack of paper drafts and Le Guin essays. Always re-reading: Borges, On Photography, Calvino.

objects.label: Half marathon medal
objects.note: 1:43:53 in Amsterdam, October 2024. The medal isn't the point. The km-8 part is.

objects.label: Running shoes
objects.note: Saucony Endorphin Pros, on their second resole. Most ideas show up around km 8, somewhere between Vondelpark and the Amstel.

objects.label: The cat (planned)
objects.note: We're planning to adopt a cat. The chair is already reserved. So is the corner of the desk.

objects.label: Tennis racket
objects.note: Saturday mornings, public courts in Westerpark. Mostly losing, but it's the right kind of losing.

objects.label: Pot on stove
objects.note: I cook for family on Sundays. Mostly Chinese, mostly experimental: yu choy, garlic, ginger, soy. Reset button at the end of any week.

objects.label: Monstera
objects.note: Fourth one. The previous three did not make it. This one is determined.
